message:
fix(runtime): harden anti-entropy, cancellable tasks, lane scheduler, and region tree

Targeted improvements across 6 runtime modules:

anti_entropy.rs (+44/-):
- Harden anti-entropy repair protocol with improved peer state tracking
  and convergence assertions

cancellable_task.rs (+111/-):
- Refactor cancellation state machine for clearer phase transitions and
  safer concurrent access patterns

lane_scheduler.rs (+75/-):
- Expand lane scheduling with new priority-aware scheduling logic and
  fairness guarantees across lane assignments

lockstep_harness.rs (+30/-):
- Improve lockstep test harness with cleaner phase synchronization and
  deterministic replay assertions

region_tree.rs (+45/-):
- Refactor region tree traversal and update region boundary assertions
  for correctness under concurrent modifications

isolation_mesh.rs (+9/-):
- Minor isolation mesh cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
